models.name: ReportAssetSummaryPayload
models.doc: A request body used to retrieve summary asset information. One and only one collection of summary identifiers must be provided: filters, metrics, or metricCategories.

properties.name: metricCategories
properties.doc: Categories to retrieve risk reporting data for.

properties.name: metrics
properties.doc: Metrics to retrieve risk reporting data for.

properties.name: filters
properties.doc: Query filters to apply to the asset summary.

properties.name: groupBy
properties.doc: A parameter to group the assets by (first level facet field), only used when the chosen summary identifier is filters.

properties.name: segmentBy
properties.doc: A parameter to segment the assets by (second level facet field), only used when the chosen summary identifier is filters.

properties.name: labelName
properties.doc: Currently unused.

properties.name: assetSummaries
properties.doc: The collection of asset summaries.

properties.name: displayName
properties.doc: The name of the summary response.  Depending on the request time this will either be the asset filter, risk category, or risk metric.

properties.name: description
properties.doc: The description of the summary response.  Filters don't have a description.

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.doc: The last time risk categories or risk metrics were captured. Set to the current time for asset filter requests, which always pull the live asset data.

properties.name: metricCategory
properties.doc: If the request is for a metric category, this will contain the requested unique category name.

properties.name: metric
properties.doc: If the request is for a metric, this will contain the requested unique metric name.

properties.name: filter
properties.doc: If the request is for an asset filter, this will contain the corresponding filter.

properties.name: labelName
properties.doc: An optional label used to filter requests results.

properties.name: count
properties.doc: The count of assets matching the request parameters.

properties.name: link
properties.doc: The link to the corresponding asset details.

properties.name: children
properties.doc: The corresponding child entities.  For metric categories this will contain metrics.  For filters with groupBy and segmentBy this will contain facets.

properties.name: action

properties.name: updatedAssetsCount

properties.name: user

properties.name: createdDate

properties.name: updatedDate

properties.name: actionParameters

methods.name: getCisaCves
methods.doc: Retrieve a list of CisaCves for the provided search parameters.

operation.name: getCisaCves
operation.doc: Retrieve a list of CisaCves for the provided search parameters.

parameters.name: apiVersion
parameters.doc: The API version to use for this operation.

shortDescription.value: A crafted request uri-path can cause mod_proxy to forward the request to an origin server choosen by the remote user. This issue affects Apache HTTP Server 2.4.48 and earlier.

vulnerabilityName.value: Apache Tomcat Remote Code Execution Vulnerability

shortDescription.value: Apache Tomcat contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for remote code execution if JmxRemoteLifecycleListener is used and an attacker can reach Java Management Extension (JMX) ports. This CVE exists because this listener wasn't updated for consistency with the Oracle patched issues for CVE-2016-3427 which affected credential types.
